title: phacelia hastata subsp. compacta
intro: Phacelia hastata subsp. compacta, also known as compact purple phacelia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to attract pollinators and its potential use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Phacelia hastata subsp. compacta include its potential to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Phacelia hastata subsp. compacta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
